name: impacket
summary: Impacket is a collection of Python classes for working with network protocols — SMB, MSRPC, Kerberos, LDAP, NTLM, RDP, WinRM, MSSQL, Exchange. Includes psexec, wmiexec, secretsdump, mimikatz wrappers, ticket forging, and relay helpers.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.
